subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 739290883/240605607 is not a GRB
body:
A. Myers (NPP/GSFC) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 739290883/240605607 at 14:34:38.21 UT
on 05 June 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to Distant Particles."
